description: Product Description Envelope Neck These baby bodysuits feature an envelope neck, which allows for easy changes and removal. The envelope neck also sits comfortably on your baby, allowing these bodysuits to be worn all throughout the day. Popper Fastening Pop up fastening makes for easy and convenient nappy changes. They also prevent the bodysuit from riding up under your little one's clothes. Short Sleeves Short sleeves mean the bodysuits are perfect for wearing alone in Summer, or for layering during the cooler months!
